name: python_function_parameter_reorder
description: Test detection of function parameter reordering in Python code
old_code:
def create_user(name, email, age=18):
    return {'name': name, 'email': email, 'age': age}
new_code:
def create_user(email, name, age=18):
    return {'name': name, 'email': email, 'age': age}

expected_changes.description: Function parameters reordered (email moved before name)
